name: appsec-threat-modeler
description: Pulls context from Jira, Jenkins, ServiceNow, and a code repository, then runs an end-to-end threat model covering both conventional application/API systems and AI/ML/LLM infrastructure: data flow diagram, trust boundaries, threat actors, STRIDE threat register (optionally full 7-stage PASTA), AI/ML-specific threats (prompt injection, training/RAG data poisoning, model extraction, excessive agency), attack-chain mapping, compensating-controls assessment, and gap-based recommendations -- with every threat mapped to OWASP Top 10 / OWASP API Security Top 10 / OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications and MITRE ATT&CK / MITRE ATLAS. Outputs a Word report, an Excel risk register, and draw.io-compatible diagrams. Defaults to Claude Sonnet for cost-efficient analysis; reasoning model is user-configurable. Also runs under OpenAI Codex CLI (AGENTS.md) and Cursor (.cursor/rules + .cursor/mcp.json).
